author: felicepantaleo
body: cmsDriver resolves --procModifiers X by importing Configuration.ProcessModifiers.X_cff, but the ticl_dev modifier was added as ticl_dev.py (without the _cff suffix), so --procModifiers ticl_dev has never worked and nothing imports the module. Rename it to ticl_dev_cff.py.
title: Configuration/ProcessModifiers: make the ticl_dev modifier usable
